title: Surgeon Vacancy at Novartis India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Novartis India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Novartis India International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Novartis India International Enterprises:
Novartis India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Novartis India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
